text:
Order of the Supreme Court
Judgment
K.V. Viswanathan, J.
1. 
Leave granted.
2. 
The present Appeal calls in question the correctness of the judgment 
dated 06.09.2021 passed by the High Court of Bombay at Goa in 
Stamp Number Main No. 944 of 2020 (F). By the said judgment, 
the High Court allowed the prayer of the respondent herein and 
quashed the order dated 04.12.2019 passed by the learned 
Judicial Magistrate First Class (JMFC) at Panaji in Criminal Case 
No. LC/19/2019/C. By the said order, the Ld. JMFC had issued 
process to the respondent pursuant to the complaint filed by the 
appellants alleging violation by the respondent of the provisions 
of the Factories Act, 1948 (hereinafter referred to as the ‘Act of 
1948’) and thereby committing offences punishable under Section 
92 thereof. 
FACTS:-
3. 
The facts lie in a narrow compass. Pursuant to the inspection 
conducted on 20.05.2019 in the premises of the respondent wherein
